title: HEPES transformation buffer
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"5e6fs","text":"HEPES buffer is commonly used to prepare prokaryotic (bacterial) cells for electroporation.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Add 40 mL distilled water to a 50 mL tube
Measure and add 11.915 g HEPESMaterials: HEPES Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #H4034
Adjust pH to pH 7.4 with concentrated sodium hydroxide or hydrogen chloride
Filter sterilize with a 0.2 µm pore-size filter
creator: Andreas Sagen
